title: Studio Sundays
description: A weekly behind-the-scenes series sharing works in progress, palette experiments, and studio rituals every Sunday morning. Followers get an unfiltered look at the creative process from first sketch to final varnish.

title: Paint With Me
description: Short-form time-lapse videos showing an entire painting come to life in under sixty seconds, set to ambient music. The series has introduced Cherise's work to a younger, broader audience.

title: Colour Stories
description: Curated mood boards pairing Cherise's paintings with the colour palettes, textures, and landscapes that inspired them. Each board tells the story behind a single artwork or series.

title: From Reference to Canvas
description: A carousel series placing the original reference photograph side by side with the finished painting, along with a caption exploring the choices made in translation — what was kept, changed, and imagined.
